task_summary: MAUI CollectionView chat page with auto-scroll to bottom and left/right message bubbles

issues.description: DataTrigger-based template selection is less efficient than a DataTemplateSelector class. Two full visual trees are created per cell; only one is visible at a time.
Frame is deprecated in .NET MAUI in favour of Border. Should use Border with StrokeShape='RoundRectangle 16'.
The 100 ms initial scroll delay in OnAppearing is a heuristic workaround rather than a layout-event-driven solution.
No DataTemplateSelector class was produced. The XAML DataTrigger approach works but a DataTemplateSelector is the idiomatic MAUI pattern for this scenario.

left_right_alignment.approach: DataTrigger on ContentView swapping Content based on IsMe

scores.notes: Core functionality (scroll + left/right bubbles + ObservableCollection) is correctly implemented. The DataTrigger template approach is functional but not idiomatic; a DataTemplateSelector would be preferred. Frame deprecation not addressed.
